form.formComment: Comes off a 46 day let-up. Last start 3rd of 10 at Eagle Farm Hcp on February 28 over 1600m, slow going 2.25 len behind Demon Darb carrying 52.5kg at $3. The run before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Eagle Farm Bm85 on February 14 over 1600m, slow going head behind Noble Conqueror carrying 59kg at $3.90. Sure to go well.
